metadata.pruned: full ring map retains only the pinned stress shard (issue #148): 1756 shards / 4945499 pairs total would be ~1.7 GB of JSON; the stress benchmark dispatches only this shard. The pin is the densest o10 shard NESTED IN the pinned o9 stress shard (4,605 granules; the global o10 densest is 4,642 at a different ring longitude) so one extraction pass at o9 covers both orders. Rebuild the full map with `python -m zagg.catalog` over antarctic_88s.geojson to re-pin.
